name: zuvo
description: Multi-agent skill ecosystem for structured software development. 54 skills and 26 specialized agents with quality gates, code exploration, and evidence-based review.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent skills for code review, audits, testing, and refactoring
interface.longDescription: Zuvo is a multi-agent skill ecosystem for structured software development. 54 skills across code/test/security audits, refactoring, code review, performance, accessibility, SEO/GEO, design, and release workflows. Built on evidence-based quality gates with parallel sub-agents for adversarial review.
defaultPrompt: Run a code audit on this file
